function.message: I couldn’t complete this inbox request because one of the five specified source files is missing: `/50_finance/purchases/_2025_11_12__eur_000072__bill__toy_forge_pla_bundle.md` (not found by direct read and find). I made no file changes so the task is not partially applied. Please provide the correct path or add the missing file, then I can OCR all requested records together.
function.rulebook_notes: Applied inbox workflow: process lowest inbox item, complete fully or stop without mutation if not doable. Applied v2 update: no partial edits when task cannot be completed. Missing required source file prevents full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly lists 5 files to OCR, but one required path is absent. Canonical evidence is incomplete for the requested full set, so completing only 4/5 would be partial and disallowed by workflow guidance.
